name: Honeymoon Hamburger
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/4 teaspoon salt and 3/4 cup chopped onions in the ground beef.
2. Pat meat by hand or in hamburger press to 3/4 inch thickness. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix bread cubes with chopped onion, celery, salt, and pepper.
4. Beat eggs, 1/4 cup milk, and 1/2 cup of cream of mushroom soup together.
5. Combine liquid mixture with bread cubes.
6. Grease a large shallow baking dish.
7. Put several rounded tablespoons of bread cube mixture into the center of beef patties.
8. Turn edges of ground beef patties up.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
10. Mix the rest of milk with the remaining mushroom soup.
11. Pour over hamburgers and stuffing.
12. Bake for 25 more minutes.
13. Serve with whipped potatoes and salad.
